title: Navigating the Moral Landscape of Digital Age AI
description: A flowchart illustrating the process of translating core ethical principles into actionable public policy for AI systems.
elements: Core Ethical Principles (e.g., Fairness, Accountability, Transparency)
Policy & Governance Levers (e.g., Regulation, Standards, Incentives)
relationships: Principles inform stakeholder analysis which guides the creation of policies that govern AI development, the impact of which is assessed to create a feedback loop for refining principles and policies.
